pages.title: Sample Page
pages.author: connoise
pages.content:
This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)

...or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

Agoe the Idol Bio

Agoe the Idol

Independent idol from Honolulu, Hawaii

Experimental pop music, digital art, and live performances. Everything is self produced!

Bio:

For over a decade, Agoe the Idol has been making music and art in small, often overlooked corners of the internet. Endless names and micro-genres. Creativity was an existential act. Experimental. Isolating. A conduit for the ether. A condenser for being. Now, with renewed clarity and vision, Agoe the Idol steps forward with intention: an explosive debut!

Be an early adopter of Agoe the Idol! Booking: im@connoi.se

pages.title: micromashii description
pages.author: connoise
pages.content:
About the MicroMashii Series:

MicroMashii are a light personal take on the Plunderponics genre. The project initially referenced music edited within unavoidable limitations: Curb-side PC parts, Longs CVS earbuds, no cables\midi. These limitations combined with the creative wellspring of the golden age of shitposting created the technical template of the MicroMashii. There are no ‘meanings’ to the MicroMashii projects but the overall impression that should be taken is that each piece exists as an experiment in digital technique, composition, and fun. 



Mixes are created digitally with a limited use of traditional syncing techniques. The results create a base field of de-fazed swirling sample-scapes. From this point any direction of composition can be used to further develop the piece. Initially, the lack of computational resources made the stacking of digital compositional elements unpredictably unstable. The traditional ‘glue’ of compression and reverb are at times absent/cranked up for this reason. The sonic environment exists as a collage of unblended extremes.

Samples are cut and selected with little regard to digital source qualities. The clashes of maximalist/minimalist signatures lead to an active argument of tones; fever dream earthquake bumps, solemn peat moss jams. ‘Digital source qualities’ also refer to the more concrete publishing source of each sample.  Some samples are manipulated beyond recognition and some are copy-pasted vanilla and sample sources are never cited. Production-wise this means that the MicroMashii will never be sold. I will remove samples if requested. This is a personal project I make no money but I will always respect individual wishes



These bold limitations allow for the elements of digital manipulation to be picked apart piece-wise. It’s an extremely simple technique that has shaped my signature sound. MicroMashii exists as the accessible fun of digital music making.

MicroMashii Vol. 1
-Currently missing-

MicroMashii Vol. 2

MicroMashii Vol. 3
4 part release
[Easy] - Beach Beach BEACH
[Normal(+)] - Day/Night :: Double Album
[Hard] - Fever Night Bangers
[Max] - Coffin Mouth

pages.title: January 2024
pages.author: connoise
pages.content:
and short recap of 2023 - - - - - -------(music at the end)


Poem

Recap on Genesis Lore

Endless body saturated with potential, structure dream precipitate on the sharpest point. Pressure condenses, develops equally in all directions. A crystalline bubble of consequence grows. 

Undulating consequence upon itself, a soapy film of connections : Universe. Simple rules and fundamental functions spill from an un-seeable primordial point. Each push inwards expressed an exponential stretch of the membrane.

Birthed consequence of consequence of dreams, pretend to be lost. Observe to live and reject the surface. Will the ocean invert a paradigm of oil? Will connections and rules sublimate to un-consequence? 

We will pretend to be surprised.

-

-

the Dunning-Kreuger curve is jank. The y-axis should be inverted as a bowl. Unwillingness to unlearn: Kunning-Dreuger. POV: the coaster car suspended on the precipice of action. A humming weakspot at the inflection blinks from the abyss. A confrontation with a reason to be proven wrong.
I don’t like to discuss what I learn. It feels from my voice like projection. Ego sludge coats me in a perfect mirrored film. We all have access to the wiki-hippocampus so speaking is like saying the joke but louder.
I want to continue to radiate pure quirky frequency, but I struggle to fill



The end state of millennial doomerism is to learn to love finding things to love. In 2023 I learned to love washing dishes.

-

In 2023 I started a medication combo that dissolved all of my thoughts. It carved channels through soft sulci. Topographies of maximum absolute production. Living felt like a natural spring hooked up to pressurized pipes. Even when I closed my mouth water escaped through the cracks.

I could only think one word at a time

Overclocked

Supersaturated

Wall Outlet

Move forward

Yawn

Tremble

I am a current

Clean

Shiver

When I first started, every morning, medication in hand, I would try to remove the dirty chemical smell of new* bupropion with a single breath. ppppffffff-. I got used to the taste but I still do it. Just to greet them. my nakama. Our secret handshake. The pressure is lower. The decayed grooves of production remain. I drip my contents and can hold no definite volume

* They dont make em like they used to


I had what I think is my first panic attack, which manifested as a plunge into dizziness and constant yawning. I actually just have a new 'thing' where I'm constantly yawning. Each yawn kinda feels like death crunching an ice cube while leaning 10degrees too far back in a flimsy desk chair. Its like the vacuum that follows a lightning bolt, from my face to my stomach. My jaw shivers and i bite my tongue to dampen the aftershock. I also enjoy cleaning now. I get by with less sleep. I suffer erratic micro-spasms and jerky muscle flexes. Water tastes bad. I go to work to create and come home to rest. Fitter, Happier–

It's a common thing with mental illness but I miss the bad times. Feeling rejected is a pit with no floor, but when you look up and see the surface shrink to a brilliant point you're suddenly just floating there. I was free to reject any or all parts of postmodern life. I lived through the seasons of bliss and suffering and nae-nae’d[gritty’d] over the quartz rumble of production. Hadal creatures, Dickinsonia-san, Sister Siphonophore, we understood the value of the cells in a leaf, an umbrella in the center of a street. Everything was beautiful and tragic and alive and already dead and I learned to love everything and I am no longer afraid of death.

In the absence of the sun the grain still bows its chaff to the rain : infinite compassion.

And now I am scared of sharing myself. I'm losing the momentum of madness. I have thoroughly become a crumbling stoic monument of inaction, observation.

I’m tired of post anxiety. The Realname vs Anon dichotomy is wearing the avatars of both apollo and dionysus. I want to post cringe. It’s the dirty living soul of the internet. But the old social spaces are no longer alive. The remaining theaters left to express the living soul only house the tools of diligence and dignity.

Every space is archived to be effortlessly interpreted and scored on a swealthy(wealthy sweaty?) Andy’s big data side hustle. Most communities dissolve before they even get started. Everyone is scared that the digital skin they touch is actually the lining of the stomach. Discord servers with discord servers to secretly talk about other discord servers. Nebula without stars.

so then there's

this-

I want to share things here. Like my medicines and my learned loves and my future plans. Monthly packets of myself. I’ll share song progress and other art. I want to precipitate my thoughts somewhere and I am paying 170+$ to host this site every year. To someone, maybe, the spill of my calcified innards will ring like a struck stalactite. 

Meeting the primordial source is an exchange to meet the last thing that can be loved. We already know, finding it will be sad. But the ocean expanded vast, deep, saturated with bliss. I want to return back to a life in the shallows. 

Thank you for reading, thank you for expanding the universe with your presence

Music Progress Demos

There's alot cause I didn't release anything last year.

Tracks from the planned concept album:

I want to share everything but it needs to live in the album

pages.title: About
pages.author: connoise
pages.content:
About

Music

I am the internet decomposing.

GIS

Over a decade of experience in Geographic Information Systems, including extensive government sector work. Specialized in advanced map production, spatial analysis, and integrating cutting-edge AI tools to solve complex geographic challenges.

Digital Art

Generative art taps into the flowing arteries of the universe. Simple, rhizomatic.

Mushroom Growing

They are models of a interconnected system. Mycelial systems allow for a differentiation of organs from the otherwise absent structure of noise.

pages.title: GIS
pages.author: connoise
pages.content:
About

With over a decade of experience in geographic information systems, I transform spatial data into actionable insights and compelling visual narratives. My practice combines rigorous analytical methodology with creative cartographic design, bridging the technical precision of GIS with the art of effective communication.

Professional Background

My foundation in geographic thinking began with a Bachelor of Arts in Geography from the University of Hawaii at Manoa, where I developed a deep appreciation for spatial relationships and environmental systems. This academic grounding in geographic theory and methodology has proven invaluable throughout my decade-long professional journey.

My GIS practice spans traditional spatial analysis to cutting-edge AI-enhanced workflows. I believe that geographic data tells stories—about communities, environments, and the complex relationships that shape our world. My role is to listen to that data carefully and translate its patterns into maps and analyses that inform decisions and inspire understanding.

Through years of production work across both private and government sectors, I've developed an intuitive sense for data quality, spatial relationships, and the subtle details that separate good analysis from great insights. My experience with government planning systems has given me deep insight into regulatory frameworks, public sector workflows, and the unique challenges of municipal and regional planning processes. Every project becomes an opportunity to reveal hidden connections and make the invisible visible.

Technical Capabilities

My toolkit has evolved alongside the GIS industry, embracing both established methodologies and emerging technologies:

Core GIS Production

  • Advanced spatial analysis and geoprocessing
  • Database design and geodatabase management
  • Cartographic design and map production for diverse audiences
  • Multi-scale analysis from local site studies to regional planning

Automation & Development

  • Python scripting for geoprocessing automation and custom tools
  • Workflow optimization and batch processing systems
  • Model development for repetitive analytical tasks

Modern Integration

  • AI-enhanced spatial analysis and pattern recognition
  • Machine learning applications for geographic data
  • Integration of traditional GIS with contemporary data science approaches

Analytical Philosophy

Geography is fundamentally about relationships—between places, people, and processes. My analytical approach prioritizes understanding these connections over simply processing data. I design workflows that not only produce results efficiently but also maintain analytical integrity and reproducibility.

Every map is an argument, every analysis a perspective. I'm committed to creating work that is both technically sound and ethically responsible, recognizing that GIS outputs influence real-world decisions affecting communities and environments.

Value Proposition

In an era of big data and automated analysis, the human geographer's role becomes more crucial, not less. I bring contextual understanding, methodological rigor, and creative problem-solving to spatial challenges. My decade of experience means I can quickly identify the right analytical approach, anticipate potential pitfalls, and deliver results that stakeholders can trust and act upon.

Whether developing custom workflows for complex spatial problems or producing publication-ready cartography, I combine technical expertise with geographic insight to transform data into knowledge.

pages.title: Art and Other Projects
pages.author: connoise
pages.content:
About

Creative Development

  • Python for generative algorithms and data visualization
  • TouchDesigner for real-time interactive installations and audiovisual performance
  • Generative processes for live experimental works

Production & Post

  • DaVinci Resolve for video editing and color grading
  • NVIDIA CUDA acceleration for computationally intensive rendering and real-time processing

Philosophy

Art disintegrates the utilitarian function of the physical and creates new units of observation. It's an evolutionary lineage inherited through systems older than the senses. Art is the organelle that forms the structure and categorization of quantized elements from noise; the emergence of plurality follows art.
